resources.string: This feature needs access to your location to share it with your partner and send a vibration signal. Please grant location permission in app settings.
Could not get your current location. Please ensure GPS is enabled and try again.
Failed to publish your location. Please check your connection and try again.
Your partner\'s location is not available yet. Ask them to open the app first.
Your partner\'s device is not reachable. Ask them to reopen the app to refresh their token.
Failed to send the vibration signal. Please try again.
You cannot send a vibration to yourself.
An unexpected error occurred. Please try again.
